prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-POTTERYCLAYTOOLSCURVED-LAUNCH Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Beginner Polymer Clay Sculpting Pottery Tools Set Art Supplies, 21pc Description: The ToolTreaux Beginner's Pottery Tools Kit includes all the essential pieces for working with a wide variety of soft mediums. Many of the sculpting tools offer double sided heads, reducing the number of tools needed but simultaneously, enabling you to reach for a wide variety of different carving, sculpting and finishing instruments to create and experiment with. The set of tools within this beginner's kit is made up of 21 implements.

The kit includes the following components:

- Storage pouch for all tools

- x11 double-sided wood handle and steel-ended tools: Curved flat fork tool, curved flat tool, curved needle point tool, curved medium spear head tool, curved large spear head tool, curved loop tool, angled needle point tool, small fork spear head tool, salt and pepper drill tool, spoolie tool and metal wire brush

- x8 traditional pottery tools: Loop for removing clay, double ended ribbon tool for cutting, slicing and shaping, needle tool to cut clay strips or holes, design work of placing objects, potter rib for shaping and smoothing, modeling tool for cutting, smoothing, contouring and decorating, a metal scraper for shaping and trimming, a sponge for wetting surface and smoothing and a wire clay cutter for slicing clay or trimming pots and other objects

The pottery sculpting ceramic tools have a variety of different carving shapes to provide greater flexibility when attempting different techniques, designs and textures. The lightweight and comfortable design of the tools combined with the variety makes it easy to work with when removing blemishes from the surface of clay. The components are made with quality steel and polished hardwoods to ensure comfortable handling and years of productive use. Search Terms: handmade art supplies pottery tools clay sculpting craft and hobby implements instruments wax resin putty mud creative design artist artisan Features: - BEGINNER POTTERY SET: This 21pc set provides ceramicists creating pottery, or working with other soft mediums, with a wide variety of tools to choose from and use when designing; the varied tool set allows artists to experiment with many different implements and are suitable for all levels - EASY TO USE POTTERY TOOLS: The polymer clay sculpting set provides you with lightweight tools which allow for fine detailing and accuracy; the double sided design of many of the tools allows you to increase efficiency without having to switch tools as frequently - QUALITY MATERIALS: All the metal tipped sculpting tools are made of quality steel to ensure they won't bend or break under pressure from repeated use; the wooden handles are smoothly finished, allowing for comfort, precision and easy handling - STORAGE POUCH INCLUDED: Two storage pouches are included to house all the pottery and sculpting tools, to keep tools organized and together when not in use - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Dimensions: 10 x 7 x 3 inches; Materials: Wood Steel; Colors: Assorted; Weight: 4.8 ounces === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
